name: International Market Health Score

interpretation.0-3: Acute pressure — multiple competitor and regulatory forces stacking against Intuit in priority markets.
interpretation.3-5: Below baseline — material headwinds outweighing tailwinds.
interpretation.5: Neutral baseline — mixed week, no dominant direction.
interpretation.5-7: Above baseline — Intuit-positive momentum or quiet from competitors and regulators.
interpretation.7-10: Tailwind — Intuit advancing while competitors and regulators are quiet or moving in our favor.

competitor_pressure.rationale: Tier-1 = direct accounting platform competing in a priority market. Tier-2 = adjacent (tax engines, payments). Tier-3 = noise.

regulatory_pressure.rationale: Urgent = forces product/compliance work. The closer to live, the more it pressures the market.

cross_signal_magnifier.rationale: When competitor + regulatory both move in the same market in the same week, accountants are getting pulled from both sides.

voc_sentiment.rationale: Computed as (Intuit positive-mention share - peer-set average positive-mention share) per platform, averaged across platforms with data.

intuit_offensive_moves.rationale: Counter-balance: when Intuit ships, hires, partners, or wins coverage, the score moves up. Default 0 unless you flag a move in intuit_moves[].

feet_on_the_ground.rationale: From your direct field input — events, customer meetings, market immersions. Default 0 until you populate the FOG section.

rounding: Sum components, clamp to [0, 10], round to one decimal.
